emails.subject: Haul-All Equipment Natural Gas Supply
emails.body: Haul-All Equipment Natural Gas Supply Jon, I need live pricing for this deal first thing tomorrow morning. Thank you. Greg Mann 2817 01-Nov-01 31-Oct-01 60 1.5610% Month Rate 11 Volume Rate 13 Volume January 1,923 February 1,241 March 1,313 April 1,034 May 794 June 561 July 519 August 397 September 620 October 1,221 November 1,890 December 1,862 TOTAL: 0 13375 Greg Mann Sales Manager (403) 663-2817 fax: (403) 663-2899 greg.mann@enron.com <mailto:greg.mann@enron.com>

emails.subject: RE: Haul-All Equipment Natural Gas Supply
emails.body: RE: Haul-All Equipment Natural Gas Supply I have assumed you wanted an end date of 31-Oct-2002. Which would result in an offer of 4.44. If you need a different time period please advise. Regards, Jon To: Mckay, Jonathan
